title: paper1a-food-crisis-typology: Reproducibility package for Reimagining Food Crises
description: Code to reproduce all analyses and figures in 'Reimagining Food Crises: Archetypes, Collapsing Recovery Gaps, Crisis Staircases, and Recovery Traps'. Starting from the Harmonized Food Insecurity Dataset (HFID v1.1.1), the pipeline detects 1,658 food security crisis episodes across 49 countries (2007-2024), classifies them into eight archetypes, computes monthly IPC phase transition matrices with bootstrap confidence intervals, and generates all publication figures.
